tradeoff:
No single 'optimal' chunk size. Tradeoffs by metric:
  Lowest first_result_delay:  1000ms
  Lowest decode latency:      1000ms
  Best RTF (efficiency):      2000ms
  Lowest CPU load:            1000ms
  Fewest decodes/min:         2000ms
Decision depends on application requirements (latency vs throughput).
methodology_notes: This benchmark measures only independent chunk inference cost. It does NOT simulate rolling buffers, incremental decoding, context accumulation, partial hypothesis revision, or transcript stabilization. Those are evaluated in separate benchmarks.
limitations: NO rolling buffer — chunks are independent, not accumulated.
NO transcript stabilization — raw per-chunk outputs, no merging logic.
NO incremental decoding — each chunk is a fresh STT request.
NO partial hypothesis revision — no mid-utterance updates.
NO LLM integration — measures STT only, not full pipeline.
NO VAD simulation — audio is pre-trimmed; real streaming has VAD delay.
Single audio clip — results may vary with different speech content.
